headline: Stripe Walks Back Price Hike After Developer Backlash, Returns to 2.9% Standard Rate

competitors.name: Stripe
competitors.pricing_model: Reverted to 2.9% plus 30 cents per transaction for card payments after widespread merchant and developer backlash forced a public reversal within three weeks
competitors.market_positioning: Developer-first positioning restored; Stripe CEO acknowledged the price increase alienated its core SMB and startup customer segment
competitors.confidence_notes: TechCrunch reporting confirmed by Stripe official blog post and verified against Stripe pricing page as of May 23 2026

competitors.name: Adyen
competitors.pricing_model: New flat-rate tier at 0.3% plus 11 cents per transaction for merchants processing under 500k monthly; eliminates minimum monthly fee for qualifying accounts
competitors.market_positioning: Flat-rate launch timed to capture merchants considering leaving Stripe during the price controversy; enrollment up 34 percent month-over-month
competitors.confidence_notes: Adyen confirmed enrollment figures in investor call; new tier now available in US, UK, and EU markets
